title: E Strip Self-Adhesive Rubber Seal – 5m Roll - Draught Excluder for Doors & Windows - Prevents Heat Loss, Blocks Dust, Dirt & Rain - Seals Gaps 2–4mm (White)
features: ENERGY SAVING & HEAT RETENTION – Reduces heat loss around doors and windows, helping lower energy bills and improve comfort in your home.
EFFECTIVE DRAUGHT PROTECTION – Creates a tight seal to block cold air, wind, and draughts from entering through small gaps.
SUITABLE FOR 2–4MM GAPS – Perfect for sealing small to medium spaces in doors and window frames to ensure an airtight fit.
DURABLE E-PROFILE RUBBER STRIP – Flexible, long-lasting self-adhesive rubber material designed to maintain shape and sealing performance.
MULTI-PURPOSE WEATHERPROOFING – Protects against dust, dirt, rain, and noise, keeping your living spaces cleaner and quieter.
EASY DIY INSTALLATION – Supplied in a convenient 5m roll with strong self-adhesive backing; simply cut to size and apply.
description: From the brand Previous page Performance You Can Trust Established in 1981, Exitex has over 40 years of expertise in designing and manufacturing high-quality, cost-effective solutions for homes and businesses. Our wide range of weather-proofing, fire safety, acoustic and energy-saving products are trusted to reduce heat loss, lower costs, improve comfort, and provide long-lasting performance. Exitex is committed to delivering innovation, reliability and protection you can trust. Engineered with Precision What makes our products unique? Every Exitex solution makes your home more comfortable, energy-efficient, and secure. Our products are easy to install, built to last, and trusted by professionals and DIYers. Why we love what we do? We believe small improvements make a big difference. Our solutions protect homes, save energy and bring everyday comfort and peace of mind. Driven by Innovation For over 40 years, we’ve created smart, practical solutions that make homes warmer and more efficient. Innovation drives us to design products that are simple to use, durable, and built to save energy. Next page
